name: smallstack-skills
description: AI skill index for Django SmallStack. Read the relevant skill before modifying the corresponding part of the codebase.

skills.name: Django Apps & CRUDView
skills.description: Creating new Django apps, CRUDView configuration, django-tables2 integration, title bar pattern. See also: api skill for REST API and auth management.
skills.use_when: Creating a new app, adding a model, building management pages, or wiring up CRUDView.

skills.name: Template System
skills.description: Template inheritance, available blocks (title, content, extra_css, extra_js, breadcrumbs), includes, and the thin-wrapper pattern for merge-safe customization.
skills.use_when: Creating or modifying HTML templates, understanding block inheritance, or adding includes.

skills.name: Building Themed Pages
skills.description: Recipe guide for building pages on the SmallStack theme. Covers the color-mix scale (4%-30%), page headers, tables, cards, stat widgets, badges, modals, and the CSS variable cheat sheet. Pages built this way work in all 10 theme/palette combinations with zero dark mode overrides.
skills.use_when: Building any new page that extends smallstack/base.html. This is the primary styling reference.

skills.name: Theming System Reference
skills.description: Complete CSS variable definitions for light/dark modes, color palette system (django, high-contrast, dark-blue, orange, purple), palette precedence, JavaScript API, dark mode persistence contract, and responsive breakpoints.
skills.use_when: Understanding the theming architecture, adding a new palette, or debugging theme/palette issues.

skills.name: Adding a Custom Theme
skills.description: Step-by-step tutorial for adding a custom CSS framework (Bootstrap, Tailwind, Tabler) alongside SmallStack's built-in theme. Covers the required template pieces (blocking script, SMALLSTACK config, theme.js), CSS override file, navbar partial, and static asset placement.
skills.use_when: The user wants to use their own CSS framework for public pages while keeping SmallStack's theme for admin tools.

skills.name: Theme Integration Scenarios
skills.description: Decision tree and step-by-step for three scenarios: (A) public site with no user login, (B) public site with user login, (C) build on SmallStack's theme. Includes settings, file placement, and common mistakes.
skills.use_when: The user is deciding how to integrate their theme, or an AI needs to understand which approach to take.

skills.name: Authentication
skills.description: Custom User model (settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL), auth views, LoginRequiredMixin, signup control (SMALLSTACK_SIGNUP_ENABLED), login/logout URLs, and protecting views.
skills.use_when: Working with auth views, protecting pages, configuring signup, or extending the User model.

skills.name: htmx Patterns
skills.description: htmx setup (vendored, no CDN), CSRF handling via hx-headers, partial templates, dual-response views (full page vs htmx partial), OOB swaps, and inline form submissions.
skills.use_when: Adding htmx interactions, building partials, or implementing inline updates.

skills.name: Help & Documentation System
skills.description: File-based help system with markdown rendering, _config.yaml structure, sections, categories, variables, FAQ pages, app-contributed docs, and search index.
skills.use_when: Adding or editing help pages, creating new doc sections, or configuring the help system.

skills.name: Settings & Configuration
skills.description: Split settings (base/development/production/test), environment variables via python-decouple, BRAND_* settings, SMALLSTACK_* feature flags, and .env file usage.
skills.use_when: Changing settings, adding environment variables, or understanding the split settings architecture.

skills.name: Timezone Handling
skills.description: TimezoneMiddleware, per-user timezone via UserProfile, localtime_tooltip template tag, and the CSS-only timezone tooltip.
skills.use_when: Working with dates/times, adding timezone-aware displays, or understanding the timezone middleware.

skills.name: Background Tasks
skills.description: Django Tasks framework with django-tasks-db backend. Task definition, enqueuing, the db_worker management command, inline vs separate worker deployment, and scaling guidance.
skills.use_when: Adding background jobs, configuring the worker deployment (inline vs separate), or understanding the task queue.

skills.name: Activity Tracking
skills.description: HTTP request logging middleware, RequestLog model, auto-pruning (configurable row cap), excluded paths, and the staff-only activity dashboard.
skills.use_when: Configuring request logging, excluding paths, or working with the activity dashboard.

skills.name: Logging & Audit Trail
skills.description: Django logging configuration, log levels, audit trail patterns, and structured logging.
skills.use_when: Configuring logging, adding audit trails, or debugging log output.

skills.name: Screenshot Workflow
skills.description: Visual verification using shot-scraper CLI and the screenshot_auth management command for authenticated screenshots. Light/dark mode, element selectors, and CI usage.
skills.use_when: Taking screenshots to verify UI changes, especially in both light and dark modes.

skills.name: Docker Deployment
skills.description: Docker Compose setup, multi-service configuration (web, worker, cron), volumes, health checks, and environment variables for containerized deployment.
skills.use_when: Setting up Docker, modifying the Dockerfile, or configuring container services.

skills.name: Kamal Deployment
skills.description: Zero-downtime VPS deployment with Kamal. deploy.yml configuration, secrets, SSL, volumes, accessories, and common commands.
skills.use_when: Deploying to production, configuring Kamal, or troubleshooting deployment issues.

skills.name: Development Workflow
skills.description: Branching strategy, testing with pytest, coverage targets, commit style, and code quality with ruff.
skills.use_when: Understanding development conventions, running tests, or preparing commits.

skills.name: Release Process
skills.description: Semantic versioning, release checklist, version bumping in pyproject.toml and _config.yaml, GitHub releases.
skills.use_when: Preparing a release, bumping the version, or creating a GitHub release.

skills.name: REST API
skills.description: CRUDView JSON API layer with Bearer token auth, token types (login/manual), access levels (auth/staff/readonly), auth management endpoints (register, me, password, deactivate), FK expansion, date filtering, aggregation, and CORS.
skills.use_when: Building or consuming REST API endpoints, managing tokens, or configuring API authentication and access levels.

skills.name: Card & Calendar Displays
skills.description: Card-grid list display protocol. CardDisplay (zero-config key-value), AvatarCardDisplay (avatar+title+subtitle+pill), authoring new card variants via item_template + build_card() subclasses, and generalizing the pattern to new list-display families.
skills.use_when: Building list displays that render as card grids, configuring CardDisplay/AvatarCardDisplay for a model, or authoring a new card variant or list display family.

skills.name: Calendar Displays
skills.description: Month-grid calendar list display. CalendarDisplay configuration (date_field, end_field, title_field, month_param), single-date vs ranged events, month navigation, timezone handling, hover tooltips, and authoring new date-based displays.
skills.use_when: Adding a month-grid calendar view to a model, configuring CalendarDisplay for date-ranged events, or authoring a new date-based list display (week, gantt, timeline).

skills.name: Frontend Integration
skills.description: Using SmallStack as a headless API backend for React, Vue, Next.js, or Svelte frontends. Covers system tokens, user lifecycle (register, login, password change, deactivate), CORS setup, and token architecture.
skills.use_when: Setting up SmallStack as a backend API for a frontend framework, or understanding the system token + login token architecture.

skills.name: Upstream Integration
skills.description: Pulling upstream SmallStack changes into downstream projects, resolving merge conflicts, and deploying after integration.
skills.use_when: Merging upstream SmallStack updates into a downstream project like opshugger or smallstack_web.

skills.name: Tabler UI — top-level orientation
skills.description: Router and project-wide rules for building Tabler-themed pages. Lists every specialized Tabler skill and the file-locations cheat sheet. Start here for any Tabler work.
skills.use_when: Starting any Tabler-themed page or component, or unsure which specialized Tabler skill to read.

skills.name: Tabler Skills — Router
skills.description: Lists all specialized Tabler skill files with which-skill-for-which-job index and glossary. Also lives in tabler-ui.md but with more detail.
skills.use_when: Need a detailed map of which Tabler skill covers which use case.

skills.name: Tabler Foundations
skills.description: Page architecture, base.html structure, asset loading order, navbar/breadcrumbs/messages wiring, available template blocks, context processors (brand.*, nav_items), template tags from theme_tags.py.
skills.use_when: Creating any new Tabler-themed page, wiring a Django view to a template, or understanding how base.html composes navbar, header, body, footer.

skills.name: Tabler Theming
skills.description: Five theme axes (theme/color/font/base/radius), 11 accent colors, dark-mode CSS variables, settings panel, theme engine API (SmallStackTheme.applyColor etc.), localStorage keys, profile sync, FOUC prevention.
skills.use_when: Changing the default accent color, customizing dark mode, debugging theme persistence, adding/removing settings panel options, or syncing theme state to profile.

skills.name: Tabler Layouts
skills.description: Layout matrix: default, boxed, condensed, fluid, navbar-dark, navbar-overlap, navbar-sticky, vertical, vertical-right, rtl. When to pick each. How to hard-code per-app. Sidebar implementation, RTL, print, mobile responsive.
skills.use_when: Choosing a page layout, hard-coding a layout per-app, implementing a new layout variant, or combining layouts.

skills.name: Tabler Components Reference
skills.description: Comprehensive component reference: cards (status, stacked, tabs, card-table), buttons (color, size, shape, group), badges, avatars, alerts, dropdowns (rich, apps-grid), modals (sizes, status-color, htmx-load), offcanvas, tabs (lazy-load), accordions, popovers, tooltips, steps, ribbons, status, empty states, timelines, progress bars, carousels, toasts, lightbox, spinners, pagination.
skills.use_when: Building any UI element except forms, tables, or charts (which have dedicated skill files).

skills.name: Tabler Icons & Typography
skills.description: Tabler Icons (5000+ stroke icons), sizing (icon-sm to icon-2xl), colors via currentColor, animations (icon-pulse/tada/rotate), common icon SVGs used in this project. Typography: headings, display sizes, weight, alignment, colors, font-family override. Code blocks with Prism.js setup. Markdown rendering via the .markdown class.
skills.use_when: Picking, sizing, or coloring icons. Choosing heading sizes. Setting up code blocks with syntax highlighting. Rendering markdown.

skills.name: Tabler Forms (basic + advanced plugins)
skills.description: Form basics (inputs, selects, switches, validation), input groups (icon, prefix, button addon), color/file/range inputs, form layouts (horizontal, inline, multi-column), advanced plugins (Flatpickr, Choices.js, tom-select, Imask, Dropzone, Signature Pad, Star Rating, NoUiSlider, autosize), multi-step wizards, Django form integration with class assignment, htmx form submission with inline validation.
skills.use_when: Building any form: signup, settings, content editing, multi-step wizards, advanced selects, date pickers, file uploads, masked inputs.

skills.name: Tabler Tables
skills.description: Table classes (card-table, table-vcenter, responsive, striped, hover, mobile-md), sortable columns via {% sortable_th %}, Django pagination with {% render_paginator %}, filters above table, htmx-driven live search + sort + paginate + inline edit + infinite scroll, DataTables.net for client-side enhancement, List.js for lightweight search, SmallStack CRUD integration, bulk actions, row expansion, sticky headers, CSV/JSON export, empty states, timezone-aware datetime cells.
skills.use_when: Building a list view, log viewer, data explorer, or any tabular presentation of records.

skills.name: Tabler Charts (ApexCharts)
skills.description: ApexCharts patterns: line, area, bar (stacked, horizontal), donut/pie, radial/gauge, sparkline, heatmap, range/timeline, mixed chart. Theme-aware colors via CSS variables. Reacting to theme/color changes with MutationObserver. Live updates via htmx polling. Tooltip customization. Chart.js mention as alternative.
skills.use_when: Adding any chart, making charts respect theme + accent color, updating charts live via htmx polling.

skills.name: Tabler Maps & Calendar (jsvectormap, FullCalendar, Sortable.js)
skills.description: jsVectorMap (world/regional maps with series, markers, click handlers, dark-mode polish), FullCalendar (events from JSON endpoint, multiple views, color-coded, recurring, drag-from-outside), Sortable.js (single list and multi-column kanban with onEnd persistence, handles, ghost styles, combining with FullCalendar drop).
skills.use_when: Adding a geographic map, full event calendar (week/month/day views), or drag-drop sortable lists / kanban boards.

skills.name: Tabler + HTMX patterns
skills.description: The critical re-init pattern for tooltips/popovers/dropdowns after swap. Lazy-load tabs (click once). Modal content via htmx with HX-Trigger close-from-server. Offcanvas with htmx. Table refresh (search, sort, paginate, infinite scroll). Toast notifications from server response. Inline edit. Out-of-band swaps. hx-push-url for SPA-like nav. Loading indicators. Polling. Confirm before destructive actions.
skills.use_when: Wiring htmx into Tabler: tab loads, modals/offcanvas content, table refresh, toasts, infinite scroll, JS re-initialization after swap.

skills.name: Tabler Dashboards page recipe
skills.description: Anatomy of an admin dashboard: page header → KPI row (4 patterns) → welcome/hero card → primary chart row → donut breakdown → recent activity table → timeline/status. Range switchers, real-time htmx updates, tabbed dashboards with lazy-load.
skills.use_when: Building an internal/admin dashboard: stat rows, KPI cards, analytics charts, recent activity, real-time monitoring.

skills.name: Tabler Landing/Marketing page recipe
skills.description: Hero (centered, split, gradient with navbar-overlap), feature grids (icon-cards, alternating left-right), pricing tables (3-tier with monthly/yearly toggle), testimonials, logo cloud, FAQ accordion, newsletter signup, CTA banner, 404/error pages, changelog. Layout tips for marketing pages.
skills.use_when: Building marketing/landing pages: hero, pricing, features, testimonials, FAQ, CTAs, 404 pages, changelog.

skills.name: Tabler Blog/Docs/Content page recipe
skills.description: Article/blog post layout with hero, markdown rendering (server-side with Pygments/markdown extensions, client-side with Marked). Code blocks with Prism + copy-to-clipboard. Table of contents with scroll-spy. Blog index (cards or compact list). Three-column docs layout (sidebar nav, content, on-this-page). Search (List.js, htmx). Slide viewer pattern. Reading progress bar. Related posts. Social share. OG/SEO meta.
skills.use_when: Building blog posts, documentation pages, knowledge-base articles, help pages, release notes, or any long-form structured content.

skills.name: Tabler API Explorer/Docs page recipe
skills.description: Endpoint sidebar with method badges + search, endpoint header (method + path + summary), parameters table, responses with tabs and status colors, try-it panel with bearer token + parameter inputs + JSON body editor, code examples for multiple languages with copy-clipboard, OpenAPI integration (ReDoc/Swagger), inline schema explorer with details/summary, versioning, auth helper alert.
skills.use_when: Building a page that documents REST endpoints, lets users try them, shows request/response examples, generates client snippets, browses an OpenAPI spec.

skills.name: Tabler Auth pages (login, signup, lock, password reset)
skills.description: Uses registration/tabler_auth_base.html. Centered card layout. Sign-in, sign-up, forgot password, set new password, lock screen, email verification, OAuth/SSO buttons, two-factor MFA with auto-advancing OTP inputs, logged-out screen. SmallStack signup-gate handling, branding overrides.
skills.use_when: Building or customizing login, signup, lock-screen, password-reset, MFA, or email-confirmation pages.

skills.name: Tabler Utility apps (kanban, todos, calendar, file manager, inbox)
skills.description: Kanban board with Sortable.js + htmx modal cards. Todo list with htmx checkbox-toggle and inline create. Event calendar with FullCalendar + filter sidebar. File manager (grid + list views, offcanvas detail, Dropzone upload). Email-style inbox (3-column with htmx detail load). Activity feed via timeline. Notifications dropdown + center. Profile/settings page with sidebar nav.
skills.use_when: Building productivity-tool-style pages: kanban boards, todo lists, calendar UIs, file managers, email inboxes.

skills.name: Tabler Customization
skills.description: Three customization layers (CSS variables, CSS overrides, fork base/partials). When to pick each. Adding new template blocks. Integrating new plugins (5-step pattern: load, dark-mode, accent-color, htmx-reinit, document). Switching to local Tabler build (quick + full SCSS rebuild). Adding new theme axes (settings panel + JS + CSS). Customizing navbar/footer. Removing cookie banner / settings panel. CSP guidance. Print stylesheets. i18n.
skills.use_when: Changing Tabler defaults, extending base template, integrating a new plugin, self-hosting Tabler, adding a new theme axis, or handling CSP.

skills.name: Tabler Troubleshooting
skills.description: Symptom index with fixes: FOUC, theme not persisting, accent color resets, charts ignoring theme changes, charts wrong in dark mode, Bootstrap components dead after htmx swap, settings panel out of sync, CDN failures, modal showing stale content, vertical layout missing, auth page showing navbar, chart 0-height in tabs, Sortable.js not persisting, Django form fields lacking Tabler classes, performance, print preview broken, settings reset incomplete.
skills.use_when: Something visual or behavioral is broken — FOUC, theme not persisting, charts ignoring dark mode, htmx swaps breaking Tabler JS, settings panel out of sync.
